use_codes.desc: RELIEF OF MODERATE TO SEVERE CHRONIC PAIN
MANAGEMENT OF NEUROPATHIC PAIN ASSOCIATED WITH DIABETIC PERIPHERAL NEUROPATHY
MANAGEMENT OF PAIN SEVERE ENOUGH TO REQUIRE DAILY, AROUND -THE-CLOCK, LONG-TERM OPIOID TREATMENT, INCLUDING NEUROPATHIC PAIN ASSOCIATED WITH DIABETIC PERIPHERAL NEUROPATHY
A METHOD OF TITRATING AN OPIOID TO MANAGE PAIN SEVERE ENOUGH TO REQUIRE DAILY, AROUND-THE-CLOCK, LONG-TERM OPIOID TREATMENT AND FOR WHICH ALTERNATIVE TREATMENTS ARE INADEQUATE
